{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Green (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Green is a character addressed by [[Blue]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"Hold off, Green. We’ll need to last longer."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
